Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Valinhall Incarnation]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — The Valinhall Incarnation has escaped his prison.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — Alin suspects Simon is trying to kill the Valinhall Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — The Valinhall Incarnation is located in the palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — The Valinhall Incarnation is described as dark, horrible, violent, and capable of having shadows that kidnap people.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — The Valinhall Incarnation is likely to be challenged by those who summon the mask.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — The Valinhall Incarnation has been consumed and warped by ambition.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 16''' — The Valinhall Incarnation can be unleashed on Zakareth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 19''' — The Valinhall Incarnation is part of a planned distraction force.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 19''' — The Valinhall Incarnation was fighting Kai.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — The Valinhall Incarnation was involved in the battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — The Valinhall Incarnation is a man with black eyes whose body is wrapped in the shadows of chains.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — The Valinhall Incarnation is a fast-moving figure with a gold-and-silver sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — Simon was fighting to slay the Valinhall Incarnation.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 1''' — The Valinhall Incarnation's presence can transform objects and environments.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 7''' — Leah's father fought the Valinhall Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — The Valinhall Incarnation is described as being scary.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 19''' — Wearing the mask causes Simon to become the Valinhall Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 20''' — Indirial is the Incarnation of Valinhall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — Simon is the only one to win a fight against the last Valinhall Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — The Incarnation of Valinhall was giving orders behind Zakareth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — Caela felt a Valinhall Incarnation outside the Gate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — A Valinhall Incarnation is a type of entity/power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — A Valinhall Incarnation may have been involved in calling black chains.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
